title: Civil news: explore legal aid opportunities in Lancaster
body: "We are inviting organisations to register for an online market engagement event. More information on Housing Loss Prevention Advice Service (HLPAS) provision and an area guide (specific information) can be found here: Housing Loss Prevention Advice Services 2025 - GOV.UK  Who can attend the event?  The event is open to organisations with an interest in providing HLPAS in Lancaster. We are also inviting representation from a wide variety of key stakeholders.  This event will be a round table discussion about securing provision in this area. This will cover delivery concerns, views on innovation and alternative delivery methods.  The online event will take place on Tuesday 16 September 4pm – 5pm on Microsoft Teams. Registration deadline is 5pm on Thursday 11 September.  Please register your interest via email or to request further information by the address below.  Further information  Civil.contracts@justice.gov.uk "
